Title: Lead Full Stack Developer

Developed web scraping and LLM-based pipelines to fetch, process, and publish localized municipal content.

Title: Associate Product Engineer

Designed and optimized database queries and stored procedures to support large campaign datasets and reporting workflows.
Authored BDD test suites using Cucumber to improve automated test coverage and reduce regression defects by 25%.
Built and maintained Jenkins CI/CD pipelines implementing blue-green deployments, reducing release time from ~10 minutes to ~30 seconds.
